title: Video Content Gap Analyzer
description: FiftyOne plugin that surfaces coverage gaps in video datasets using Twelve Labs Marengo embeddings, KMeans clustering, and Pegasus video-language descriptions.
bullets: Won "Best Data Curation Plugin" at the Voxel51 + Twelve Labs hackathon — built in under 7 hours
Auto-tuned KMeans with silhouette scoring; flags sparse and isolated clusters as underrepresented content
Outputs a single 0–1 coverage score over UMAP grid occupancy for go/no-go dataset decisions

title: AI Code Review Agent
description: Autonomous LLM agent that reviews GitHub pull requests via a 5-node LangGraph pipeline. Posts severity-grouped Markdown reviews on every PR.
bullets: 5-node LangGraph pipeline using Llama 3.3 70B (Groq); Pydantic-validated outputs across 15 languages
Achieved 68.2% precision and 50.0% recall on a synthetic PR benchmark; documented 32% false-positive rate
Full Langfuse observability — per-node latency, token usage, and cost tracking

title: ArXiv Intelligence MCP
description: Model Context Protocol server that turns the ArXiv corpus into a queryable research assistant. Published to the Pulse MCP registry.
bullets: DocLing PDF ingestion with ChromaDB vector store for persistent semantic memory across sessions
RAG pipeline with chunking strategy tuned for dense scientific papers and math-heavy formulations
Published to the canonical Pulse MCP registry — usable by any MCP-compatible client

title: AI-GovBot (HARVEY)
description: RAG-based legal assistant for AI regulatory questions. Hybrid BM25 + semantic search across the AGORA dataset, deployed on GKE.
bullets: Hybrid BM25 + vector retrieval cut hallucination rates by 20% on governance queries
Airflow + DVC + TFDV pipeline ensures 99% data freshness across legislative updates
Containerized on GKE with MLflow + Langfuse — sub-2s response times under concurrent load

title: OpenFold Mini
description: Mini-implementation of OpenFold protein structure prediction on consumer GPUs. Custom CUDA kernels and aggressive MSA compression.
bullets: Custom CUDA attention kernel — 45% inference speedup vs CPU baseline
Compressed MSA database from 2TB to under 100GB; supports sequences up to 1K residues
Mixed-precision FP16/FP32 for sustained 80% GPU utilization on consumer hardware

title: Chess Agent
description: Pure-Python chess engine with full rule support. Minimax with alpha-beta pruning, custom evaluation heuristic, profiled and optimized.
bullets: Minimax with alpha-beta pruning + move ordering — 25% more positions evaluated per second
Heuristic factoring material, mobility, center control; opening book bypasses early-game search
100% PyTest coverage on move generation, special moves (castling, en passant), endgame detection
